lessons.text: Grade the relative-value pair on ALPHA vs BTC-beta, not raw return: the BTC-long/ETH-short pair was up in dollars only because BTC-beta carried it - the spread (alpha) actually decayed against us. When the pair's beta-residual drifts off zero, attribute the PnL to beta and do NOT credit the thesis.

The winning shorts all entered crowded-long flushes (L/S>~1.15 + elevated funding into a stalling tape, on a confirmed 4h breakdown) - DO take that setup as the co-equal mirror of the squeeze long, so the desk does not drift long-only by only ever recording long edges.
